nasb.text: When they entered, he looked at Eliab and thought, “Surely the Lord’s anointed is before Him.”

esv.text: When they came, he looked on Eliab and thought, “Surely the Lord’s anointed is before him.”

cnv.text: 他們來到的時候，撒母耳看見以利押，就心裡想：“在耶和華面前的這位，必是他所要膏立的。”

ccb.text: 耶西及其众子来了，撒母耳看见以利押，心里想：“这位肯定是耶和华要膏立的人。”
